title: Impress note and background: v9 completes both required edits
instruction: Add a note "APP" into the slide and give the slide a purple background color.
why_selected: Both final requirements are visible: the note text is entered in Notes view and the slide background changes to purple.

no_skills.caption: No-skills: interacts with the sidebar and menus but does not complete the combined note plus purple-background requirement.
